title: Steve's Lava Chicken Song
description: Replaces Stal music disc texture to: Jack Black Steve's Face, and Stal sound to Steve's Lava Chicken Song from A Minecraft Movie.
body:
**This is a resource pack that I decided to make for A Minecraft Movie. It replaces the stal music  with Jack Black Steve's Face and Lava Chicken Song. The resource pack is for Minecraft Java version 1.9.0.**

**[1.21.6](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/minecraft-java-edition-1-21-6) Version Out Now!**
---
